streak.title: Your streak
streak.freeze_hint: A freeze saves your streak when you miss a day. Earn one every 7 days — you can hold 2.
streak.at_risk: Don't lose your {{days}}-day streak — one lesson today keeps the flame alive!
streak.today_done: Today is in the bag. Come back tomorrow to keep the flame burning.
streak.start: Complete a lesson today to light your flame.
streak.keep_going: You're on a roll — show up tomorrow to grow it.

badges.title: Your awards
badges.subtitle: Small wins add up — collect them all.

growth_leap.name: Growth Leap
growth_leap.desc: Beat your pre-quiz score by 25+ points

comeback.name: Comeback
comeback.desc: Miss a day, use a freeze, and keep going

next_badge.streak_one: {{count}} more day in a row unlocks {{name}}
next_badge.streak_other: {{count}} more days in a row unlock {{name}}

next_session.title: When will you study next? Set it now.
next_session.hint: One tap — your reminders will match it.

growth.pre_post: You went from {{pre}}% to {{post}}% — that's real growth!
growth.grew: You've grown +{{delta}}% since your last attempt!
growth.baseline: You scored {{score}}% — that's your baseline. Everything from here is growth.
growth.steady: Your best is still {{best}}% — every retrieval makes it stick.

reminder_digest.title: Time for a quick review
reminder_digest.body: Your spaced practice is due — a few minutes locks it in.

coach_digest.title: Your weekly coaching check-in
coach_digest.body: A fresh look at your week — and one focus for the next.

dropoff_alert.title: Learners may be falling behind
dropoff_alert.body: Some learners in your cohort look at risk — check in with them.

certificate_issued.title: Certificate ready 🎓
certificate_issued.body: You completed {{title}} — view or download your certificate.

project_graded.title: Your project was graded
project_graded.body: {{title}} has been reviewed. Tap to see your result.

assessment_invalidated.title: An attempt was invalidated
assessment_invalidated.body: An integrity review invalidated an attempt — you may need to retake it.

final_failed.title: Not passed yet
final_failed.body: You didn’t pass {{title}} this time. Check your retakes and try again.

payout_processed.title: You got paid 💸
payout_processed.body: {{amount}} for {{entityTitle}} is on its way to your account.

payout_failed.title: Payout issue
payout_failed.body: We had an issue paying out {{entityTitle}}. Our team is on it.

earn_back_processed.title: Earn-Back on its way 🎉
earn_back_processed.body: {{amount}} is being refunded to your payment method.

earn_back_no_payout.title: Course complete
earn_back_no_payout.body: No Earn-Back remaining on {{entityTitle}} — but your certificate is ready.

earn_back_failed.title: Earn-Back processing
earn_back_failed.body: We're processing your Earn-Back for {{entityTitle}} — our team will be in touch.

payout_failed_admin.title: Payout failed (action needed)
payout_failed_admin.body: Instructor payout failed: {{reason}}. Please review and open a support ticket.

earn_back_failed_admin.title: Earn-Back refund failed (action needed)
earn_back_failed_admin.body: Earn-Back refund failed: {{reason}}. Please review and open a support ticket.

pacing.ahead: You're ahead of your weekly goal — {{done}}/{{target}} lessons this week. Great momentum!
pacing.on_track: Nice steady pace — keep the rhythm going.
pacing.behind: A little behind your weekly goal — one more lesson keeps you on track.
pacing.rushing: You're moving fast! A quick recap of what you learned makes it stick.
